title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM NINETY, GROUP PARAGRAPH "m," FOR THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5070 / 52 OG No. 8, 3903 (July 31, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1491, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM NINETY, GROUP PARAGRAPH "m," FOR THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item ninety, group II, paragraph "m" for the Province of Camarines Sur, section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"90. San Jose Home Economics Building, San Joseâ

Completion

P2,500.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
